scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env prod
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run prepare-release-data && astro build --mode staging && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.prettier:check: git ls-files -z -- . | grep -zE '\.(astro|ts|tsx|cts|mts|js|jsx|cjs|mjs|json|json5|jsonc|css|scss|html|md|mdx|yml|yaml)$' | xargs -0 -r prettier --plugin prettier-plugin-astro --check
scripts.prettier:write: git ls-files -z -- . | grep -zE '\.(astro|ts|tsx|cts|mts|js|jsx|cjs|mjs|json|json5|jsonc|css|scss|html|md|mdx|yml|yaml)$' | xargs -0 -r prettier --plugin prettier-plugin-astro --write
